name: DATZ WORLD HOLDINGS CORP.
business: Leafbuyer Technologies, Inc. provides a comprehensive marketing technology platform for cannabis dispensaries and product companies. The platform includes new customer acquisition and retention tools such as texting, loyalty programs, and application software. It reaches millions of cannabis consumers monthly through its web-based platform, loyalty platform, and smart application technology.

exposures.sentence: Our wholly owned subsidiary, LB Media Group, LLC has evolved and grown as a listing website to a comprehensive marketing technology platform that focuses on new customer acquisition and retention tools that include texting and loyalty and application software technology.
Because we operate in the cannabis industry, we face a high risk of business failure due to the nature of advertising a federally Illegal product.

tamClaims.claim: global market size of 197 billion by 2028
tamClaims.sentence: Leafbuyer operates in a rapidly evolving and highly regulated industry that has been estimated by Fortune Business Insights to reach a global market size of 197 billion by 2028.

tamClaims.claim: global market size of 444.34 billion by 2030, with a 34.03% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: Leafbuyer operates in a rapidly evolving and highly regulated industry that, as has been estimated by Fortune Business Insights to reach a global market size of 444.34 billion by 2030, with a 34.03% CAGR.
